---
title: "control_mh1_primprod.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Controller for daily and backfill MODIS-Aqua MH1 primary productivity runs.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/scripts/control_mh1_primprod.py >}}
```

:::
